name: Chinese Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch green beans in boiling water for 3 minutes. Drain and run under cool water to stop cooking. Pat dry.
2. Heat wok over medium-high heat. Add sherry, garlic, and ginger. Stir for a few seconds.
3. Add green beans and stir for a minute.
4. Add stock, soy sauce, sesame oil. Combine sherry and cornstarch.
5. Add to wok. Stir until the sauce is thickened.
6. Reduce heat to simmer and cook for another 3 minutes.
7. Stir in scallions and serve.
